info.title: Extra
info.description: 'Cleanup' - Runs cleanupcode on the current project.

options.name: --solution-file
options.description:
Optional. Path to .sln file.
By default ReGitLint will use the first sln file
it finds.

options.name: --files-to-format
options.description:
Optional. Default is Pattern. Choices include:
Pattern      Format files that match pattern.
Staged       Format staged files.
Modified     Format modified files.
Commits      Format files modified
between commit-a and commit-b.

options.name: --pattern
options.description:
Optional. Only files matching this pattern will be
formatted. Default is ** / *

options.name: --commit-a
options.description: Partial or full sha hash for commit A

options.name: --commit-b
options.description: Partial or full sha hash for commit B

options.name: --jb
options.description:
Arg passsed through to jb cleanupcode. Allows
multiple. e.g. --jb -d --jb --toolset=12.0 see
https://www.jetbrains.com/help/resharper/
CleanupCode.html#command-line-parameters for a
full list of options.

options.name: --jb-profile
options.description:
Passed to jb cleanupcode as --profile "VALUE"
negates --format-only

options.name: --format-only
options.description: Only format files instead of running full cleanup.

options.name: --fail-on-diff
options.description:
Exit with non-zero return code if formatting
produces a diff. Useful for pre-commit hooks or
build server stuff.

options.name: --skip-tool-check
options.description:
Skip the check to see if the jb dotnet tool exists.
--disable-jb-path-hack Don't prefix file paths sent to jb cleanupcode
with '**/'. May reduce false positive matches.

options.name: --jenkins
options.description:
Format files changed between recent commits and
fail on diff

options.name: --assume-head
options.description:
If the commit specified doesnt exist HEAD is used
instead. This was added to work around a bug
when building pull requests via jenkins.

options.name: --print-diff
options.description: Prints the full diff on fail-on-diff

options.name: --print-fix
options.description:
Prints the regitlint command to run to fix
formatting

options.name: --print-command
options.description: Prints the jb command before running it

options.name: --prettier
options.description: Exclude file types supported by prettier
